title: nerine humilis subsp. fera
intro: Nerine humilis subsp. fera is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Nerine humilis subsp. fera is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
